name: White Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 oz NESTLE Premier White baking bars (6 oz each)
9 oz NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels (1 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt 3 foil-wrapped bars of NESTLE Premier White baking bars; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt; set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Blend in egg and vanilla extract. Beat in melted baking bars. Gradually beat in flour mixture until soft dough forms.
5. Shape dough into a ball and flatten to 3/4 inch thickness. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 15 minutes until firm.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the dough to 1/8 inch thickness. Cut into shapes using 2 1/2-inch to 3-inch cookie cutters. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until edges are golden brown. Let stand for 2 minutes before removing from cookie sheets and cooling completely.
8. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt the remaining 3 foil-wrapped bars of NESTLE Premier White baking bars. Spread or pipe melted baking bars onto the cooled cookies.
9. Decorate with NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Rainbow Morsels, attaching with melted baking bars.
10. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
CHRISTMAS TREE HANGING COOKIES: Make a hole near the top edge of each cut-out before baking using a skewer.
